services.title: UptimeRobot query
services.summary: Diff monitors, status pages, and alert contacts vs config; optional --import from live API (JSON on stdout).

services.title: UptimeRobot maintain
services.summary: Reconcile managed monitors, status pages, and alert contacts to UptimeRobot API v2.

next_steps: Run `hdc run infrastructure uptimerobot query --` to verify live vs config drift.
Set `managed: true` on entries hdc should own before running maintain.
Public status pages remain on stats.uptimerobot.com unless you configure custom domains in UptimeRobot.
